content.en:
Although the Ten-Star Earth Venerable Fierce Beast was powerful, it was far from being Ye Tian's opponent.

Ye Tian easily killed the first ten-star Earth Venerable Beast in seconds, then seized the resources possessed by this fierce beast, and then continued to hunt other Ten Star Earth Venerable Beasts or suppress the Ten Star Earth Venerable Beasts.

He didn't dare to kill ten ten-star earth-honored beasts, because hunting and killing ten-star earth-honored beasts was also considered to be a complete task, he wouldn't be so stupid, once he killed ten heads, it would be equivalent to completing the task ahead of schedule.

The resources of the territory were plundered by Ye Tian, which caused the anger of many ten-star Earth Venerable beasts, and some of the ten-star Earth Venerable beasts even joined forces to besiege Ye Tian, but they were easily avoided by Ye Tian.

It's not that he's afraid of these beasts, but he doesn't want to waste time.

When the day was almost over, Ye Tian found the two fierce beasts with the combat power of the one-star god general, these two fierce beasts had been sleeping, if no one bothered them or approached their territory, they would almost never wake up!

Ye Tian came here with only one goal, to collect resources!

He believed that these two fierce beasts with the combat power of a one-star god general must have a lot of rare resources, and even helped Ye Tian a lot.

"Horned Kirin!"

Ye Tian came to the territory of one of the one-star god generals and the fierce beast, and with a sweep of the copying talent, he knew the name and talent of this fierce beast.

Judging from the name, this horned unicorn should have a not weak unicorn bloodline.

The Qilin bloodline here is not the Qilin bloodline in the universe, the Qilin bloodline in the universe is relatively weak, after all, the Qilin clan in the universe does not even have a strong supreme, so it is not a powerful bloodline.

And the Qilin bloodline in the world of the Qilin Hall comes from chaos, so it is very powerful, otherwise it would not be possible to give birth to a fierce beast with the combat power of a one-star god general.

Rumble!!!

The horned qilin sensed that someone had intruded into its territory, woke up, and roared at Ye Tian.

Then, it attacked Ye Tian.

"Great Destruction!"

For the first time, Ye Tian used this top-notch supernatural power on other creatures.

Wow!

The light of destruction pierced through the Horned Kirin's body, and then the Horned Kirin's body began to crumble and crack, but it was still not dead.

Then, a second light of destruction came.

This time, the horned unicorn couldn't bear it at all, its body turned into powder, and even its soul was completely annihilated.

"Dead!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This horned unicorn is actually not weak, at least it has the combat power of a peak god general in the early stage of a star, but unfortunately there is nothing to protect his life, and it is difficult to resist the Great Destruction Technique, so he was killed by two rays of destruction light.

As a one-star god-level beast, the horned unicorn has a lot of treasures in its collection, and one of them is even more joyful to Ye Tian.

"Superb Blood Spirit Grass!"

Ye Tian was really excited when he saw this elixir.

This is not an ordinary elixir, but a superb blood spirit grass that can only be born after hundreds of millions of years of watering with powerful bloodline power, which is many times more powerful than ordinary blood spirit grass.

It can't improve its strength, nor can it save its life, but it can improve its understanding, although it is a short-term improvement of understanding, but it is enough to increase the comprehension of a one-star god general-level powerhouse by a hundred times in a short time.

This is not only a hundredfold increase in the speed of comprehension, but also a thousandfold or even a thousandfold increase!

For example, the Great Dao has fallen into a bottleneck, and it is difficult to break through for hundreds of millions of years, but once the supreme blood spirit grass is used, the shackles can be broken.

Therefore, the top-grade blood spirit grass is very precious to god-level powerhouses, and a top-grade blood spirit grass is even comparable to hundreds of ordinary chaos spirit treasures in the chaos, and it is even priceless.

If a top-grade blood spirit grass appeared in the chaos, I am afraid that it would cause some three- or four-star god generals to fight.

"Earn big!"

Ye Tian was excited.

If he made reasonable use of this top-grade blood spirit grass, he could even make his strength soar, after all, the top-grade blood spirit grass was enough for him to maintain a thousand years of cultivation.

"Keep it first, and use it when you go out!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, he went to hunt another fierce beast with the combat power of a one-star god general, and quickly killed the other party, but he did not obtain too precious treasures, obviously it was luck to obtain the best blood spirit grass.

The Fifth World.

Ye Tian came in.

But when he came in, he found that this world was not big, and there were very few fierce beasts, far inferior to other worlds.

"Examiner, stay in the fifth world for one day to pass the assessment!"

The voice of the machine spirit came.

"Stay all day!"

Ye Tian understood what this meant.

There are only hundreds of fierce beasts in the fifth world, but more than eighty are ten-star extreme earth-level fierce beasts, which are not far from the combat power of one-star god generals, while the other fierce beasts are all one-star god generals, and some have reached the late stage of one-star god generals.

Ye Tian was discovered by them as soon as he came in, originally they were sealed in enchantments one by one, but at this moment, the enchantments were broken, and they killed Ye Tian one after another.

In such a situation, it is difficult to live for a day.

The point is, there is no good in this world!

This is a desolate continent with unlikely resources.

Obviously, the first few worlds are welfare worlds, and the latter is the real assessment of strength, and no more resources will be sent.

"That's right, according to the division of the world level, if the later world sends resources, you have to send more precious resources, Qilin Allah also estimates that you don't want to waste too many resources, but you can't get a disciple with great potential, isn't it a loss?"

Ye Tian thought so.

At this moment, in the face of so many fierce beasts, even a one-star peak god general-level powerhouse would not be able to bear it, and would be besieged and killed.

But Ye Tian was not afraid at all.

"Just to verify the power of the Great Immortal Technique!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Rumble!!!

Several one-star gods killed the fierce beasts, Ye Tian did not dodge, but opened the Great Immortal Technique to shake these god-level fierce beasts.

Bang!

Ye Tian was sent flying, but those god-level fierce beasts were not having a good time, and they were all hit by Ye Tian's Great Destruction Technique, and they were injured one after another.

"It's fine!"

Ye Tian took a look at his body, there were no injuries on his body, and all the attacks just now were blocked by the Great Immortal Technique.

"Good!"

Ye Tian took the initiative to kill these fierce beasts, relying on the Great Immortal Technique to fight frantically.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was completely at a disadvantage, but gradually, he relied on the Great Destruction Technique, the Heavenly Killing Knife, the Hunyuan Domain, the Hunyuan Slash and other means to bombard and kill one fierce beast after another.

When the day was almost over, Ye Tian was the only one left in this world, and all the other fierce beasts were killed by him.

But at this time, Ye Tian's consumption was also very large, and he was also injured, but the injury was not serious.

"Won, the Great Immortal Destruction Technique is too terrifying, and with the Great Destruction Technique, it is enough for me to ignore the siege!"

Ye Tian sighed.

After waiting for a while, the voice of the machine spirit came.

"Assessor, congratulations on breaking through the fifth world and obtaining the qualification of a named disciple of Qilin Allah!"
